fields.name: supply_system_type
fields.description: Earthing system. Engineer-declared in v1.0 (v1.1+ will consume from earthing intent).

fields.name: supply_ze_declared_ohm
fields.description: Earth fault loop impedance at the consumer's origin (Ze). Engineer-declared.

fields.name: supply_psc_declared_ka
fields.description: Prospective short-circuit current at the supply origin (PSCC). Engineer-declared (v1.1+ will consume from fault-level intent).

fields.name: parent_db_designation
fields.description: Parent distribution board designation (e.g. 'CU-MAIN', 'DB-P1'). Engineer-declared string reference. No db-layout intent consumption in v1.0.

fields.name: parent_db_pfc_ka
fields.description: Available PFC at the parent DB busbar. Used to verify breaker breaking capacity (Icu).

fields.name: room_briefs
fields.description: Array of {room_id, room_type, dimensions_m, special_location, anticipated_loads, socket_count_target}. See room-types ontology for room_type enum.

fields.name: preferred_topology
fields.description: GB: auto picks ring for domestic + radial for commercial. Other jurisdictions: always radial. Engineer override permitted.

fields.name: drawing_standard
fields.description: Drafting standard reference. Defaults per jurisdiction (GB/KE: BS 1192:2007+A2:2016; INT: ISO 19650:2018; US: AIA CAD Layer Guidelines 2007).
